category_sources: Official govmomi govc README says govc is a vSphere CLI built on top of govmomi.
source_facts.description says govc is a command-line tool for VMware vSphere.
display_name_sources: Official govmomi govc README heading uses govc.
docs_sources: Official govmomi repository govc README documents the CLI and its usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/vmware/govmomi; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official govc README describes automation-oriented vSphere CLI usage.
source_facts.description identifies VMware vSphere CLI functionality.
